zh.Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里 聖 馬丁
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alys Cordray於1542年出生在英國維爾爾特時，她的父親Thomas Cordray III23歲，母親Jane Morris19歲。她於1570年與Thomas Bartelmew在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1577年在她的家鄉享年35歲。

zh-hans.Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里 聖 馬丁
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alys Cordray于1542年出生在英国維爾爾特时，她的父亲Thomas Cordray III23岁，母亲Jane Morris19岁。她于1570年与Thomas Bartelmew在英国英格兰維爾爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1577年在她的家乡享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cordray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French coer de roi ‘(having the) heart of a king’. This surname is now extinct in Britain.

variants.name: Cordrey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Cordray . Alternatively, possibly derived from Old French corderie ‘ropery, rope-walk’, taken to mean a worker at a ropery.

nameMeanings.name: Alys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Alice
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Alys Cordray was born in 1542, in Chute, Wiltshire, England, her father, Thomas Cordray III, was 23 and her mother, Jane Morris, was 19. She married Thomas Bartelmew in 1570, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1577, in her hometown, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alys Cordray est née en 1542, à Chute, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Cordray III, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Jane Morris, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Bartelmew en 1570, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1577, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alys Cordray 1542 in Chute, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Cordray III 23 und ihre Mutter Jane Morris 19. Sie hat 1570 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Bartelmew geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1577 im Alter von 35 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alys Cordray è nata il nel 1542 nel Chute, Wiltshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Cordray III, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Jane Morris, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Bartelmew nel 1570, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1577, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.Chute, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアチウト
ja.St Martin, Wiltshire, England: イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイア
ja.Salisbury St Martin, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー スト マルティン
ja.lifeSummary: Alys Cordrayが1542年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアチウトで生まれた時，父Thomas Cordray IIIは23歳，母Jane Morrisは19歳であった。1570年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでThomas Bartelmewと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1577年に故郷で35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alys Cordray(이)가 1542년 영국 윌츠히르 c후트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Cordray III(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Morris(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1570년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Thomas Bartelmew(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1577년 그녀의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alys Cordray nasceu em 1542, em Chute, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Cordray III, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Jane Morris, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bartelmew em 1570, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1577, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alys Cordray родилась в 1542 г. в местности чут, уилцхир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Cordray III было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Morris, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bartelmew в 1570 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1577 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alys Cordray nació en 1542, en Chute, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Cordray III, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Jane Morris, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Thomas Bartelmew en 1570, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1577, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años.
